UpdateSslVpnUsers.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/VPC/s/gjwvyu77i/).
UpdateSslVpnUsers.userId: The ID of the SSL-VPN user.
UpdateSslVpnUsers.password: Password, 8–17 characters, must contain a combination of letters, digits, and symbols; allowed symbols: !@#$%^*(_
